tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died

tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died

tu.note:
இவ் + ஊர் + ஏ = இவ்வூரே இவ் = this ஊர் = town ஏ= Particle / interjection
பொய்க்கும் = பொய் + க் + க் + உம் பொய் = lies க் = சந்தி = rules for combining letters க் = Medial particle/Tense marker உம் = Adjectival Participle Suffix

tuv.seg: people in this town are saying lies

tu.note:
இவ் + ஊர் + ஏ = இவ்வூரே இவ் = this ஊர் = town ஏ= Particle / interjection
பொய்க்கும் = பொய் + க் + க் + உம் பொய் = lies க் = சந்தி = rules for combining letters க் = Medial particle/Tense marker உம் = Adjectival Participle Suffix

tuv.seg: people in this town are saying lies

tu.note:
தோழியது = தோழி + அது தோழி = friend அது = grammatical case suffix here, 6th case(Genitive Case) suffix, used in the meaning - of or 's ( belonging to)
துயரே = துயர் + ஏ துயர் = sorrow ஏ = அசைநிலை (Expletive or fill in word)

tuv.seg: beautiful dark complexion girl, our friend's sorrow

tu.note: போலும் = to resemble (used as figurative form) போல் + உம் = போலும் போல் = Simile Markers உம் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)

tuv.seg: he appears to be noble also his grace it is

tu.note: அருளுமார் = அருள் = grace

tuv.seg: he appears to be noble also his grace it is

tu.note: preene- to clean and tidy feathers with its beak (உளர)

tuv.seg: as it preened it lost its feathers on the sand heap

tu.note: preen = to clean and tidy its feathers with its beak.

tuv.seg: as it preened it lost its feathers on the sand heap

tu.note:
அனைக்கோ = for her here, her = friend friend of the speaker(தோழி) speaker = தோழி (friend of the heroine) friend = தலைவி (heroine)
எனக்கு + ஓ = எனக்கோ எனக்கு = for me ஓ = அசைநிலை (Expletive or fill in word)

tuv.seg: for me, he seems to be loving her but she assumes differently

tu.note:
ஓதம் + ஒடு = ஓதமொடு ஓதம் = waves ஒடு = grammatical case suffix here, 3rd case suffix (Sociative Case) denotes the meaning 'with'
துறைவற்கு = துறைவன் + கு துறைவன் = lord of the sea shore கு = grammatical case markers here, 4th case suffix (Dative Case) which denotes the meaning 'for'

tuv.seg: they moved along the waves of the backwaters, for the lord of the seashore

tu.note:
ஆனத் = ஆதல் = act of becoming
துறைவன் + கு = துறைவற்கு துறைவன் = the lord of the shore கு = grammatical case suffix here, கு = 4th case suffix (dative case) denoting the meaning - to, for

tuv.seg: for the lord of the shore, where the everlasting nectar fragnance of water lilies lingers,

tu.note: ஆனத்=ஆதல்= the act of becoming துறைவன் + கு = துறைவற்கு here, கு is a grammatical case suffix added to noun. கு is 4th case suffix which means to him / for him

tuv.seg: the lord of the shore, scent of the water lillie's unending nectar fragnance lingers

tu.note: ஆன

tuv.seg: to the lord of the shore where the scent of water lillie's unending nectar fragnance lingers
the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it
the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it,

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it,

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it,
the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note: காண் + இய = காணிய காண் = see இய= Optative Verb or Benedictive Verb suffix

tuv.seg: the soft-stepping stork went to see it

tu.note:
கானல் + அம் = கானலம் கானல் = seashore/ grove அம் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)
பெருந்துறைத்= பெரு(பெரிய) + துறை பெரு=பெரிய = big / large துறை = Ghat / Port
துணையொடு = துணை + ஒடு துணை = companion, partner ஒடு = grammatical case suffix 3rd case suffix ( sociative case) denotes - with
கொட்கும் = கொட்கு + உம் கொட்கு = to roam, to revolve உம் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)

tuv.seg: roam with its companion in the big port's groves,

tu.note: துறைவன் + ஓடு = துறைவனோடு here, ஓடு is a grammatical case suffix (வேற்றுமை உருபு) added to nouns. ஓடு is one of the 3rd case suffixes.

tuv.seg: stay in the seashore grove, the lord of the shore

tu.note: துறைவன் + ஓடு = துறைவனோடு துறைவன் = the lord of the shore ஓடு = grammatical case suffix 3rd case suffix ( sociative case) denotes - with

tuv.seg: stay in the seashore grove, the lord of the shore

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை
This poem is uttered by heroine, in the context where the friend of the heroine requests the heroine to accept the hero, who is returning from his courtesan’s house. As the hero asked the heroine’s friend to convey his message.
The white heron, white stork, and water lily are ‘regional elements’ of the sea landscape.
கருப்பொருள்கள் = regional elements நெய்தல் நிலம் = sea landscape
இரற்று + உம் = இரற்றும் இரற்று = to make sound உம்= சாரியை (intermediate affix) கானல் + அம் = கானலம் கானல் = seashore/ grove அம் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)

tuv.seg: it cried helplessly in a seashore groves
it cried helplessly in a seashore groves

tu.note: தண்ணந் = தண் + அன் தண் = cool (குளிர்ச்சி) அன் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)

tuv.seg: the lord of the cool shore, you should see

tu.note:
சென்மோ = சென் (செல்) + மோ சென் (செல்) = go, leave மோ = (முன்னிலையசை, an expletive )
நலனே = நலன் + ஏ நலன் = virtue ஏ = அசைநிலை (Expletive or fill in word)

tuv.seg: give back her virtues which you took and leave

tu.note:
காதலோனே - generally used to describe lover here, in this context used as my beloved son
தான் here, it is used to denote oneself like himself, herself

tuv.seg: he came alone, my beloved son

tu.note: வரை = marriage

tuv.seg: they say he, the lord of that seashore will marry her

tu.note:
here, they = people of the sea landscape. வரை + உம் = வரையும் வரை / வரைதல் = marriage உம் = சாரியை (intermediate affix)
here, her denotes to the courtsean

tuv.seg: they say he, the lord of that seashore will marry her
they spread in the clear backwaters, the lord of the shore

tu.note:
சேர்ப்பன் + ஒடு = சேர்ப்பனொடு சேர்ப்பன் = lord of the shore (martime tract) ஒடு = grammatical case suffix 3rd case suffix ( sociative case) denotes - with
வாரான் = வா(வர்) + ஆ + ஆன் வா =come - பகுதி ஆ = எதிர்மறை இடைநிலை(Negative Infix) ஆன் = ஆண்பால் வினைமுற்று விகுதி(Masculine Singular Finite Verb Suffix)

tuv.seg: in the clear sea, he did not come with the lord of the shore

tu.note:
நன் + நெடு = நன்னெடு நன் = good நெடு or நெடிய = long / great
நாடும் + ஓ = நாடுமோ நாடும் or நாடு = search / to seek

tuv.seg: wil the girl with long luscious hair ever seek

tu.note: நாடுமோ = நாடு + ஓ நாடு = here, to seek ஓ = Expletive, filler particles

tuv.seg: will the girl with long luscious hair ever seek

tu.note:
இரக்குவென் = இரக்கு(இரங்கு) + வ் + ஏன் இரக்கு(இரங்கு) = beg வ் = Future Tense Infix ஏன் = First Person Singular Finite Verb Ending
அல்லேன் = அல் + ஏன் அல் = not ஏன் = First Person Singular Finite Verb Ending

tuv.seg: i will never beg you even for a thing

tu.note: நெக்கு = relent

tuv.seg: my broken heart will no longer yield
my broken heart will no longer yield
my broken heart will no longer yield

tu.note: நொந்ததன் = distress

tuv.seg: its distress is further burdening its grief, oh you lord of this seashore
In spite of its hunger it stayed, oh the lord of cool waters

tu.note:
பண்டையின் = பண்டை + இன் பண்டை = old days இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of 'From, Than'
இனைஇ = இனை + இ இனை = to be worried, agony
here she is refered to Harlot / Courtesan

tuv.seg: she is very much worried more than the past,

tu.note: செம்மறுத் = செ + மறு செ = redness மறு = spot

tuv.seg: trembled and lost the feathers with red spots
trembled in agony, trampled the water lilly,

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை
This poem is uttered by heroine, in the context where the friend of the heroine requests the heroine to accept the hero, who is returning from his courtesan’s house. As the hero asked the heroine’s friend to convey his message.
The white heron, white stork, and water lily are ‘regional elements’ of the sea landscape.
கருப்பொருள்கள் = regional elements நெய்தல் நிலம் = sea landscape

tuv.seg: poem utterance: heroine said to her friend, who came as a hero's messanger.

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the heroine as a response to her friend. Her friend said that the hero loves her, but she (heroine) is upset with him because she heard that he is going to marry his courtesan.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை

tuv.seg: poem utterance: the heroine respond to her friend.

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by friend of the heroine to the Messengers sent by the hero, who is returning from his courtesan’s house.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை Messengers = வாயில்கள்

tuv.seg: poem utterance: friend of the heroine said to the messangers.

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the heroine to her friend, who requests the heroine to let the heroine in. As a respond heroine says these words.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape)

பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the heroine to her friend. The hero wants to come back, he sends messangers to the heroine to let him in. Her friend advises her to accept him as she (heroine) is pregnant. She gets upset with her friend and utters these words.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape)

பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the friend of the heroine to the hero as he returns after a quarrel with his courtesan, asking for entry. She refuses the entry.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை

tuv.seg: poem utterance : friend of the heroine said to the hero

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by friend of the heroine to the Messengers / hero's friends sent by the hero, requesting to let him in the house. The friend of the heroine refuses the entry by uttering these words.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை Messengers = வாயில்கள்

tuv.seg: friend of the heroine said to the hero's friends

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the heroine to herself. She is concerned her husband (hero) will seek entry into their home with their son, but the son comes home alone.
heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape)

tuv.seg: poem utterance: heroine said to herself

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the friend of the heroine to the hero as he returns back from his courtesan, asking for entry. She refuses the entry.
friend of the heroine = தோழி heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை

tuv.seg: poem utterance: friend of the heroine said to the hero

tu.note:
பாடல் கூற்று = poem utterance
This poem is uttered by the heroine to the hero, as he returns back after a quarrel with his courtesan asking for entry. She refused the entry and ask him to go back to her (courtesan).
heroine = தலைவி hero = தலைவன் (here, hero of the sea landscape) Courtesan = பரத்தை

tuv.seg: poem utterance: heroine said to the hero.

tu.note: யான் + ஏ = யானே யான் = I ஏ = இடைச்சொல் (particle / interjection)
பெறூஉம் = அளபெடை (prolongation of sound) போர்வு + இன் = போர்வின் போர்வு = heap இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick
போர்வின் = போர்வு + இன் போர்வு = heap இன் = grammatical case markers here, 5th case suffix (ablative) which denotes the meaning of 'from'

போல் or போல = Simile Markers கண்போல் = like the eyes
மிதிப்ப = மிதி + ப் + ப் + அ மிதி = to step on something ப் = சந்தி = rules for combining letters ப்= Medial particle/Tense marker அ = Adjectival Participle Suffix

tuv.seg: it stepped, the water lilies which resemble the eye blossomed

tu.note:
போல் = to resemble (used as figurative form)
மிதிப்ப = மிதி + ப் + ப் + அ மிதி = to step on something ப் = சந்தி = rules for combining letters ப்= Medial particle/Tense marker அ = Adjectival Participle Suffix

tuv.seg: it stepped, the water lillies which resemble the eye blossomed

tu.note:
here her and she is refered to Harlot / Courtesan
முயங்கு = embrace

tuv.seg: embrace her lord, she is very confused

tu.note: யான்+எவன் = யானெவன் யான் = I எவன் = what

tuv.seg: what i will do with him

tu.note: யான்+எவன் = யானெவன் யான் = I எவன் = what

tuv.seg: what i will do with him

tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died
because the chick of the white heron dies

tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died

tu.note: பெயரடை= adjective குருகு + இன்

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died

tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died

tu.note: குருகு + இன் = குருகின் குருகு = heron இன் = grammatical case suffix here, 5th case suffix(ablative case) denotes the meaning of heron's chick

tuv.seg: as the chick of the white heron died
